taxonomy: Notonia pendula is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Notonia, which is part of the larger family of daisies and sunflowers. This classification suggests that Notonia pendula is closely related to other plants in the Asteraceae family, such as daisies, sunflowers, and zinnias. The plant's classification also indicates that it is a part of the broader group of flowering plants, known as angiosperms. Notonia pendula's classification is based on its physical characteristics, such as its flowers and leaves, as well as its genetic makeup.
